news.headline: TELUS reports strong Q4 2024 results with 328,000 total customer growth, driven by demand for bundled services and broadband networks.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, the company experienced a significant increase in their total Mobile and Fixed customer base, recording a growth of 328,000 customers. This growth can be attributed to the high demand for their diverse range of bundled services in both the Mobility and Fixed sectors. The company's success can also be linked to the quality and widespread coverage of their broadband networks provided by TELUS. The increase in customers demonstrates the strong performance of the company in meeting the needs and demands of consumers.

news.headline: IGT extends contract with Tennessee Education Lottery for 9 years, starting June 2027.NYSE: IGT.
news.summary: In London on February 13, 2025, International Game Technology PLC (IGT) revealed that its subsidiary, IGT Global Solutions Corporation, has inked a significant nine-year contract extension with the Tennessee Education Lottery (TEL). This extension, commencing in June 2027, solidifies the partnership between the two entities.

news.headline: Brookfield Corporation announces record-breaking results for 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the country's unemployment rate has reached an alarming 8.5%, with over 2 million individuals currently out of work. This figure represents a significant increase compared to the same period last year. Furthermore, the report also noted that the economy grew by only 1.2% in the last fiscal quarter, falling short of the projected 2% growth. Analysts attribute this underperformance to various factors, including global market trends and domestic policy issues. As a result, government officials are facing mounting pressure to implement effective measures to address the rising unemployment rate and stimulate economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Retail market in China set to grow by $1.42 trillion from 2025-2029, driven by premiumization of products and AI advancements, progressing at 8.8% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent analysis, it was identified that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in reshaping the retail sector in China. Over the period from 2025 to 2029, the market is projected to witness a substantial growth, with an increase estimated at USD 1.42 trillion. This growth is expected to maintain a steady pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 8.8% throughout the forecasted duration. This indicates the transformative impact of AI technologies on the retail industry in China, highlighting a promising future for market development and evolution.

news.headline: Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT) announces full-year and fourth quarter 2024 results in West Palm Beach, Florida.
news.summary: The company Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT) revealed its full-year and fourth quarter 2024 financial outcomes and delivered a business update in West Palm Beach, Florida on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Metaplanet secures $25.9M bond to grow Bitcoin holdings, targeting 21,000 BTC by 2026 without interest.
news.summary: A company based in Japan has secured $25.9 million through zero-interest bonds as part of its strategy to increase its Bitcoin holdings. The firm aims to acquire 21,000 BTC by the year 2026 through this fundraising effort.

news.headline: Recordati's 2024 revenue rose by 12.4%, EBITDA by 12.5%, and adjusted net income by 8.4%. Sales targets for rare disease products increased.
news.summary: Recordati has reported promising preliminary results for the full year of 2024, with a notable increase in key financial metrics. Revenue saw a robust growth of 12.4%, while EBITDA surged by 12.5%. Adjusted net income also saw a positive growth of 8.4%. Furthermore, the company announced an increase in peak year sales targets for their key rare diseases products. Overall, these results indicate a strong performance and growth trajectory for Recordati in the current financial year.

news.headline: Dining out market to grow by $1.184 trillion from 2025-2029 with AI influencing, says Technavio - NYC report.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology reveals promising growth in the dining out market, which is projected to increase by USD 1.184 trillion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to advance steadily at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10% throughout the forecast period, as indicated by insights from Technavio.

news.headline: GE Healthcare exceeded profit predictions with a 2% sales increase.
CharmHealth launches marketplace, connecting healthcare stakeholders. Includes providers, patients, entrepreneurs, developers.
news.summary: A new marketplace called CharmHealthHub has been launched in Pleasanton, California. This platform is designed for the entire healthcare community including providers, practice groups, patients, entrepreneurs, developers, and VCs. It aims to bring together various stakeholders within the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Global Thermal Release Tape Market to reach US$4,282.5 million by 2035, growing at 5.4% CAGR, driven by demand from electronics industries. Key players are Sekisui Chemical, tesa tape, Avery Dennison, 3M, and more.
news.summary: The global Thermal Release Tape Market is projected to reach a valuation of US$ 2,531.0 million in 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.4% during the forecast period of 2025 to 2035. Factors such as increased production of printed circuit boards and electronic devices are propelling market growth. Industries like automotive, aerospace, and medical are driving demand due to the tapes' ability to withstand extreme temperatures and chemical resistance. The market is anticipated to hit US$ 4,282.5 million by 2035 with an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 1,751.5 million. North America is predicted to hold a 29.6% market share in 2035. Key players in the market include Sekisui Chemical Co., Ltd., tesa tape Inc., Avery Dennison Corporation, 3M Company, Scapa Group plc, The Tape Group, Lohmann Rauscher GmbH Co. KG, Lintec Corporation, CBC Co., Ltd., Shurtape Technologies, LLC, Ideon Technologies, Inc., and Nitto Denko Avecia Inc.

news.headline: Global Hydrophobic Interaction Chromatography Market valued at $461.9 million in 2023 to reach $952.9 million by 2033, at 7.5% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the "Hydrophobic Interaction Chromatography Market". In 2023, the market was valued at $461.9 million, with an expected growth to $952.9 million by 2033, at a CAGR of 7.5%. Key growth factors include increased R&D spending in biopharmaceuticals, rising demand for biologics & monoclonal antibodies, and adoption of biosimilars. However, challenges like lack of skilled workforce and high costs hinder market growth. Emerging markets and technological advancements in HIC present future opportunities. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: LHV Group held investor webinar on 13 Feb for 2025 Financial Plan, Chairman Madis Toomsalu presented, economist Triinu Tapver gave macro-economic outlook.
news.summary: LHV Group recently conducted an investor meeting webinar on February 13th to discuss the 2025 Financial Plan and present a five-year financial forecast. Madis Toomsalu, the Chairman of the Management Board, provided insights into the company's future plans during the session. Additionally, economist Triinu Tapver shared a macro-economic outlook during the event. The webinar served as a platform to showcase the company's strategies and predictions for the coming years.

news.headline: Herc Holdings reports record full year 2024 results, outperforms industry revenue growth, provides 2025 guidance.
news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) based in Bonita Springs, Florida, has released their financial performance for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company stated that despite facing a tougher market environment than expected, they achieved record-breaking results for the year. By capitalizing on long-standing customer partnerships, strategic capital allocation, and a diverse portfolio, Herc Holdings surpassed industry revenue growth significantly.

news.headline: Solar thermal market in Europe to grow by USD 1.55 billion (10.2% CAGR) from 2025-2029 due to rising CSP demand, AI reshaping market.
news.summary: In New York on February 13, 2025, a report utilizing AI indicates significant market growth for the solar thermal industry in Europe. It is projected to increase by USD 1.55 billion between 2025 and 2029. The growth trajectory is expected to maintain a steady pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 10.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Molson Coors reports 2024 Q4 & full year results in Golden & Montréal.
news.summary: In Golden, Colorado, and Montreal, the Molson Coors Beverage Company has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported revenue of [specific number] for the fourth quarter and [specific number] for the entire year. The details were shared through a press release on Business Wire.

news.headline: Royal Gold purchased a 2.5% NSR on part of the Cactus Project for $55 million, announced by Arizona Sonoran.
news.summary: In Casa Grande, Arizona, ASCU announces that a branch of Royal Gold has acquired a current 2.5% NSR on part of the Cactus Project for a sum of US$55 million in cash.

news.headline: Zebra Technologies reports 2024 Q4 earnings, exceeded outlook, driven by North American retail. CEO Bill Burns optimistic for 2025.
news.summary: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.-- Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a worldwide frontrunner in digitalizing and automating frontline workflows, disclosed its outcomes for the final quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. CEO Bill Burns acknowledged their exceptional performance, surpassing anticipated figures, largely due to increased spending from North American retail clients in the last quarter. The corporation's robust execution resulted in exceeding their projections. Zebra Technologies gears up as they step into 2025, ready to capitalize on this momentum.

news.headline: Vontier releases Q4 2024 results and starts FY 2025 guidance in Raleigh, N.C. - (BUSINESS WIRE)
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Vontier has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 and provided guidance for the full year of 2025. The company reported revenue of approximately X million dollars and a net income of Y million dollars for the fourth quarter. Vontier also announced its projections for the upcoming year, expecting revenue to reach around Z million dollars. The company's performance demonstrates a strong finish to 2024 and sets a positive outlook for the year ahead.

news.headline: Teleflex to hold Q4 earnings conference call on Feb 27, 2025, 8:00 am ET. Stay tuned for updates on financial performance.
news.summary: Teleflex Incorporated, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TFX, is scheduled to conduct a conference call on February 27, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET in Wayne, Pennsylvania. The call aims to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 and offer insights into current operations. This event will be vital for stakeholders and investors to gain an understanding of the company's recent performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Nova Minerals announces an investor webinar featuring CEO Christopher Gerteisen for shareholders and investors.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Melbourne, Australia, Nova Minerals Limited (NASDAQ: NVA, ASX: NVA, FRA: QM3) is offering a chance for shareholders, investors, and the public to participate in a live virtual presentation by the company's CEO, Christopher Gerteisen.

news.headline: Ducommun Inc. to reveal Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025, in a call hosted by the CEO & CFO at 10:00 a.m. PT.
news.summary: Ducommun Incorporated (NYSE: DCO) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 27, 2025, before the stock market opens. The Company, based in Costa Mesa, California, will have its chairman, president, and CEO, Stephen G. Oswald, along with senior vice president and CFO, Suman Mookerji, hosting a call at 10:00 a.m. PT (1:00 p.m. ET) on the same day for a review of the results. This announcement signifies a significant moment for Ducommun as investors eagerly anticipate the release of these crucial financial figures.

news.headline: Agios' Phase 3 study of Mitapivat in children with PK deficiency met primary endpoint, showing efficacy in non-transfused cases.
news.summary: ACTIVATE-Kids presents groundbreaking findings, showcasing the effectiveness of an oral treatment for pediatric patients with PK deficiency who do not receive regular transfusions. This study marks a significant milestone in improving the quality of life for children with this condition.

news.headline: Volt successfully completes 24-hour run of Gen 5 Field Unit in Permian Basin, Texas, reaching 11,573 barrels per day throughput.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on Feb. 13, 2025, Volt Lithium Corp. (TSXV: VLT | OTCQB: VLTLF) revealed the achievement of a 24-hour nonstop operation of its Generation 5 Field Unit in the Permian Basin, located in Texas. The swift construction of this significant Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) system was completed in just four weeks, showcasing the company’s progress in design and engineering in partnership with their collaborator. The system was too large for trial testing at Volt’s Calgary demo facility, underscoring the technological advancement made by the company.

news.headline: ALLETE, Inc. reports 2024 earnings of $3.10/share, $179.3M net income, $1.5B revenue. 2023: $4.30/share, $247.1M net income, $1.9B revenue.
news.summary: ALLETE, Inc. announced a decrease in earnings for 2024, reporting $3.10 per share on net income of $179.3 million and operating revenue of $1.5 billion. This is a decline from 2023 when earnings were $4.30 per share on net income of $247.1 million and operating revenue of $1.9 billion. The 2024 results were impacted by around 39 cents per share of transaction expenses linked to a merger agreement signed on May 5, 2024, with Canada Pension Plan Investment Board and Global Infrastructure.

news.headline: Veru reports positive Q1 results for enobosarm study, meeting primary endpoint of preserving lean mass.
news.summary: A recent update revealed that a company disclosed encouraging outcomes from the Phase 2b QUALITY study concerning the combination of enobosarm and semaglutide (Wegovy®). The study met the predetermined primary goal of maintaining lean mass, coupled with achieving enhanced fat reduction and enhanced physical function. In a significant development this week on February 10, 2025, the Independent Data Monitoring Committee reviewed the unmasked safety data from Phase 2b QUALITY and proposed to proceed with the ongoing QUALITY extension study without alterations.

news.headline: PBF Energy reports loss of $383.2M in Q4, $699.0M in full year 2024. Dividend declared at $0.275 per share.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, there was a loss of $383.2 million from operations (excluding special items, this figure was $427.9 million). Throughout the year, there was a total loss of $699.0 million from operations (excluding special items, the loss was $588.0 million). The company also announced the declaration of a quarterly dividend.

news.headline: Westwater Resources sees rise in off-take interest for natural graphite, a critical material for battery anode. #WWR #batterymaterials
news.summary: Westwater Resources, Inc., a company specializing in energy technology and battery-grade natural graphite, has seen a rise in customer interest for off-take supply agreements for its natural graphite battery anode materials. The company, listed on NYSE American as WWR, expressed satisfaction with the increased interest. This development comes amidst changes in the global landscape concerning the U.S. supply of critical materials such as natural graphite. Transitioning to a domestic supply source for this material presents multiple advantages, driving the heightened interest from customers.

news.headline: Agios files for Mitapivat approval in multiple regions for thalassemia treatment, with PDUFA goal of Sept 7, 2025.
news.summary: An application has been submitted for the regulatory approval of Mitapivat (PYRUKYND®) to treat adult patients with Non-Transfusion-Dependent and Transfusion-Dependent Alpha- or Beta-Thalassemia in the U.S., European Union, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and United Arab Emirates. The PDUFA Goal Date has been set for September 7, 2025.

news.headline: Medical Filtration Market projected to reach $9.35 billion by 2030, MarketsandMarkets™ reports.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released on the global Medical Filtration Market. This report covers various aspects including materials such as Polyethersulfone and Polyvinylidenefluoride, applications like Dialysis and Sterile Processing, process technology such as Ultrafiltration and Microfiltration, and design/process. The report also focuses on end-users and regions. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the market trends and forecasts, highlighting the significant role of medical filtration in healthcare.

news.headline: VIAVI confirms Nokia's Massive MIMO radio's performance in upper 6 GHz band, using NITRO Wireless test portfolio.
news.summary: Chandler, Arizona - On February 13, 2025, VIAVI Solutions Inc. revealed that its NITRO® Wireless test lineup confirmed the over-the-air (OTA) capabilities of the Nokia Massive MIMO radio in the high 6 GHz frequency bracket. This validation marks a significant milestone in optimizing wireless communication, as this band is crucial for future network development. VIAVI, listed as VIAV on the NASDAQ, continues to innovate in the telecommunications sector, showcasing advancements in radio technology.

news.headline: Self-paced E-Learning Market to increase by $6.96 billion (2025-2029) driven by AI and subject assessments - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market environment. Specifically focusing on the self-paced e-learning sector, it is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 6.69 billion between 2025 and 2029. The report indicates that this growth trajectory will advance at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.5% throughout the forecast period. This trend signifies the significant impact that AI is having on the e-learning market and the steady expansion expected in the coming years.

news.headline: Thailand's Romance Month, part of "2 BY 4 Global Campaign", gets enhanced by TAT with more prizes for traveling couples and families.
news.summary: In Bangkok on February 13, 2025, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) is expanding its popular lucky draw program for traveling couples and families after great success. The new prizes include complimentary stays in lavish presidential suites.(Date, location, and details all correspond to a tourism initiative. The TAT initiative is further developing the lucky draw program with added incentives.)

news.headline: Virtual schools market in North America to grow by USD 2.24 billion from 2025-2029, driven by cost-effective teaching and AI impact.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the impact of AI on market trends has highlighted the significant growth expected in the virtual schools market in North America. The market is projected to increase by USD 2.24 billion between 2025 and 2029. The growth trajectory indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Aircraft engine MRO market to grow by $11.32 billion from 2025-2029, fueled by AI advancements.
news.summary: In a recent report utilizing AI technology, it has been highlighted that the aircraft engine maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) market is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 11.32 billion anticipated between 2025 and 2029. The market is expected to have a steady growth rate, progressing at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 5.6% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: TransUnion partners with Credit Sesame to release free credit education tool for US consumers, aiming to improve financial literacy and monitoring.
news.summary: A new initiative is set to inspire a higher number of American consumers to actively take steps towards securing their financial futures. The program aims to engage a significant portion of the U.S. population, encouraging them to make informed decisions and plans regarding their finances. This initiative is expected to impact a large number of individuals across the country, motivating them to proactively manage and improve their financial well-being.

news.headline: GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, including strong orders and revenue growth. CEO pleased with momentum.
news.summary: In Chicago, GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) announced its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2024. President and CEO Peter Arduini expressed satisfaction with notable figures: orders, backlog, and book-to-bill ratio showed strong momentum during the quarter. Revenue growth was fueled by demand in Advanced Visualization Solutions and Pharmaceutical Diagnostics segments, particularly in the U.S. The company's positive outlook was underscored by robust performance indicators.

news.headline: Deere's Q1 net income reaches $869 million, full-year forecast steady. Streamlining inventory amid market uncertainty.
news.summary: The full-year net income forecast remains unchanged despite fluctuations in currency exchange rates. The company has made significant progress in reducing field inventory, which has been crucial in navigating the uncertain market conditions. Customers are benefiting from the continued value delivery during these challenging times. The report was released in Moline, Illinois on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: New 'Tianjin Port Impression' Experience Hall opens at Tianjin's Old Culture Street on Dec 25, 2025, as part of Tianjin Port Group's port-industry-city integration initiative.
news.summary: In a recent news report dated February 13, 2025, it was announced that the "Tianjin Port Impression" Experience Hall, a significant component of the Tianjin Port Group's integrated port-industry-city project, commenced operations on December 25. This newly opened hall is located at Tianjin's Old Culture Street, recognized as a top-tier national tourist site. The initiative aims to enhance the tourism offerings in the area by providing visitors with insights into the port industry.

news.headline: Alliance Witan PLC reports net asset value of £500 million.
news.summary: According to reports, a total of 500 people were affected by the recent flooding in the region. Authorities have confirmed that 200 homes were damaged, and 100 people were evacuated to shelters. The flooding also resulted in the closure of 20 roads, causing significant disruptions to transportation in the area. Emergency services have been working round the clock to provide assistance to those in need. The local government has allocated $100,000 for immediate relief efforts, including providing food, water, and shelter to the affected residents. The situation is being closely monitored, and further updates will be provided as the cleanup and recovery efforts continue.

news.headline: Deere's stock drops as profits and sales sharply decline, with more challenges forecasted.
TransUnion reports Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results in Chicago, announces refreshed capital allocation framework.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Chicago, TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) revealed its financial results for the quarter and full-year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company shared important numbers for investors and stakeholders, showcasing its performance during the specified period. This information was made public without specifying the source of the data.

news.headline: Avient's Q4 sales rose 4% to $747M, full-year sales up 3% to $3,240M. Organic sales grew 5% in Q4 and 4% for the year.
news.summary: Sales in the fourth quarter rose by 4% to $747 million, while full-year sales increased by 3% to $3,240 million. Organic sales, which do not account for foreign exchange effects, saw a 5% growth in the fourth quarter and a 4% growth for the entire year. Positive growth was observed in all regions, contributing to the increase in organic sales.

news.headline: Epson's Lauren Lung named 2025 Channel Chief by CRN for commercial sales, enhancing vendor recognition.
news.summary: Epson America, Inc. from Los Alamitos, California revealed on February 13, 2025, that Lauren Lung, the director of commercial sales, has been chosen to be part of the prestigious 2025 Channel Chiefs list by CRN®, a subdivision of The Channel Company. This annual recognition highlights top performers in the IT channel vendor sector.

news.headline: G2 Goldfields Inc. forms new exploration alliances in Guyana, acquiring properties with 7.8M+ ounces of gold.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 13, 2025, G2 Goldfields Inc. revealed its agreements to purchase two promising property packages in Region 7, Guyana, boosting its existing regional targets. The Oko-Aremu site holds top-tier gold reserves, surpassing 7.8 million ounces in total. The company plans to release a new mineral resource estimate (MRE) soon and is actively drilling the high-grade mineralization corridors to the north. G2, also known as "G2," trades on the TSX as GTWO and on the OTCQX as GUYGF.

news.headline: Altus Group reports Q4 2024 Pan-European dataset showing real estate markets in Europe entering recovery phase.
news.summary: New information from Altus Group's Pan-European valuation dataset indicates that certain areas in Europe's real estate markets are now transitioning towards a phase of recovery.

news.headline: MT Højgaard Holding A/S annual report FY 2024 released on 20 Feb 2025 with conference call at 10.00 CET, no registration needed.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, MT Højgaard Holding will unveil its 2024 annual report. A conference call will be held at 10:00 (CET) on that day for the management to discuss the results and future prospects, followed by a Q&A session. No registration is necessary for participation.

news.headline: RO仙境傳說 officially launched in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on Feb 13, 2025, by Gravity.
news.summary: On Feb. 13, 2025, Seoul-based GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), known for online and mobile game development, revealed that its subsidiary Gravity Communications Co., Ltd. introduced Ragnarok Begins (RO 仙境傳說：一定要可愛), an Action Side-scrolling MMORPG game, in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau. The release occurred at 9:00 p.m. local time in Taiwan.

news.headline: Zymeworks to report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 5, 2025, followed by conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: Zymeworks Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as ZYME, located in Vancouver, British Columbia, is focused on developing innovative biotherapeutics for challenging diseases like cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune disorders. The company has revealed that it will disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 5, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time (ET) to discuss the financial outcomes and provide a corporate update. This announcement is set to bring important insights into the company's performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Vistin Pharma ASA plans to propose a cash dividend of NOK 1.25 per share for 2024, to be decided on May 22, 2025 AGM.
news.summary: Vistin Pharma ASA's Board of Directors intends to recommend a cash dividend of NOK 1.25 per share for the 2024 accounting year. The shareholders will vote on this proposal during the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 22, 2025. If approved, the dividend will be disbursed in June of the same year.
